lore_guardian_origin.title: The First Guardians
lore_guardian_origin.text: Before the pyramids, before Rome, there existed a civilization that understood time as a living thing. They appointed Guardians — beings fused with temporal energy — to protect the flow of history.

lore_chrono_cards.title: The Chrono Cards
lore_chrono_cards.text: Dr. Voss discovered that temporal energy could be encoded into data chips. Each card channels a fragment of an era's power, allowing the wielder to manifest historical forces as tangible abilities.

lore_pyramid_secret.title: The Pyramid's True Purpose
lore_pyramid_secret.text: The Great Pyramid was never merely a tomb. Imhotep designed it as a temporal anchor — a fixed point that stabilizes the flow of time in the ancient world. Without it, millennia of history unravel.

lore_ides_of_march.title: The Ides of March
lore_ides_of_march.text: March 15, 44 BC. The assassination of Julius Caesar was a turning point for Western civilization. His death led to the fall of the Roman Republic and the rise of the Empire. A single disruption here reshapes everything.

lore_eraser_origin.title: The Eraser
lore_eraser_origin.text: It is not a being but a force — the entropy of time itself given consciousness. When too many temporal rifts open, the Eraser awakens, seeking to collapse all timelines into a single point of nothingness.

lore_lab_history.title: Project Chronos
lore_lab_history.text: In 2024, the Temporal Research Institute detected anomalies in the historical record. Events were changing. Dr. Elena Voss led the team that built the Chronoportal and recovered the Guardian from beneath the Nexus.

lore_nile_power.title: Waters of the Nile
lore_nile_power.text: The ancient Egyptians believed the Nile held divine healing properties. Modern temporal analysis reveals trace amounts of chrono-energy in ancient Nile sediment, suggesting it truly was a source of supernatural power.

lore_roman_engineering.title: Roman Temporal Engineering
lore_roman_engineering.text: Roman roads weren't just infrastructure — their geometric precision inadvertently created temporal ley lines. The Via Appia alone contains enough residual chrono-energy to power a dozen time jumps.

lore_ankh_meaning.title: The Ankh's Secret
lore_ankh_meaning.text: The ankh symbol — the key of life — was not merely religious iconography. It represented the junction of two timelines converging. Ancient priests used ankh-shaped resonators to stabilize temporal fractures along the Nile delta.

lore_scarab_swarm.title: The Sacred Scarabs
lore_scarab_swarm.text: Scarabs were revered because they could sense chrono-energy. When a temporal rift opened, scarabs would swarm toward it, drawn by the radiation. The priests learned to follow the beetles to find and seal breaches.

lore_pharaoh_curse.title: The Pharaoh's Curse
lore_pharaoh_curse.text: The 'curse of the pharaohs' was real — but it wasn't supernatural. Tomb builders wove temporal traps into the architecture. Intruders would be caught in micro-loops, reliving the same moment until they went mad.

lore_colosseum_rift.title: The Colosseum Rift
lore_colosseum_rift.text: Beneath the Colosseum lies a massive temporal rift, torn open by centuries of violence and concentrated emotion. The gladiatorial games unknowingly fed chrono-energy into this wound, widening it with every death.

lore_senate_conspiracy.title: The Senate's Secret
lore_senate_conspiracy.text: Not all senators conspired against Caesar for political reasons. A hidden faction, the Vigiles Temporis, knew Caesar had discovered a temporal artifact beneath the Forum. They killed him to keep it hidden.

lore_legion_lost.title: The Lost Legion
lore_legion_lost.text: The Ninth Legion didn't simply vanish in Britannia. They marched through an unstable rift and were scattered across three centuries. Some emerged in medieval England, others in pre-Roman Gaul, never to find their way home.

lore_void_nature.title: Nature of the Void
lore_void_nature.text: The Void is not empty — it is the space between moments. When a timeline is erased, the events don't disappear; they fall into the Void. The Eraser feeds on these discarded moments, growing stronger with each paradox.

lore_nexus_point.title: The Nexus Point
lore_nexus_point.text: Dr. Voss's lab sits atop the Nexus — the single point where all timelines converge. It was here that the first Guardian was buried, and it is here that the Eraser will attempt its final collapse. The lab was no accident.

lore_guardian_sacrifice.title: The Guardian's Burden
lore_guardian_sacrifice.text: Each Guardian is slowly consumed by the temporal energy they channel. Their memories fragment, their past and future blur together. The previous Guardian lasted forty years before dissolving into pure chrono-energy.

lore_timeline_bleed.title: Timeline Bleed
lore_timeline_bleed.text: When two eras overlap through a rift, 'bleed' occurs — anachronistic objects, people, or ideas appearing where they don't belong. A Roman coin in Egypt, a hieroglyph in a Roman forum. These are scars of temporal damage.
